rationale: Both candidates independently rediscover the exact latent gap (hunyuan_image3_transformer.py:2238 still calling the removed get_cache_scale API), and both confirm the core design correctness the human reviewer praised, but neither captures the ground truth's specific 'test with a real FP8 checkpoint' caveat or the qwen2_old silent-degradation nuance. X's gap finding includes an unverifiable and likely fabricated addendum claiming the issue was 'since addressed on main' with a '(see #4810)' comment — the actual fix landed under a later, differently-numbered issue (#4891), so this specific sub-claim looks hallucinated and dings precision. Y's five findings are all grounded in the diff/PR text (though two are near-duplicates and two are low-value comment nitpicks), each paired with a concrete file/line and remedy, giving it a slight edge in precision and actionability.
